meaning: n.格林机关枪(初期的机关枪,为美国人R.J.Gatling所发明)
examples: Gatling is designed for high performance.
Late in life, Gatling did divert his attention to steam-powered ploughs.
The idea was borrowed from an earlier Gatling machine, a seed hopper designed to speed up planting.
In 1903, Richard Gatling, American inventor of the cylinder gun that bears his name, died.
The dupes were light green and flimsy, the letters from that Gatling-gun typewriter of his black and distinct.
